g.text: (guard → apply pass → readiness pass → optional rollback pass)
Guard & apply pass (reconcile invocation — phase: pending)
Web App is primary guard — this is the
Readiness is checked on re-invocation, not here.
Readiness check pass (reconcile re-invocation — phase: provisioning)
Repeated on each re-invocation until Ready, failed, or rolling_back.
visible to End User in the portal
Rollback readiness pass (reconcile re-invocation — phase: rolling_back)
Repeated on each re-invocation until rollback is confirmed or exhausted.
Rollback retries exhausted — cluster state unknown
